metadata.source: Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, China Lighting Industry Association (CALI), National Bureau of Statistics, 中国照明电器协会

industry_overview.title: China Lighting Industry Overview (2026)
industry_overview.summary: China is the world's largest producer and exporter of lighting products, accounting for over 60% of global lighting output. The industry has transitioned from traditional lighting to LED and smart lighting, driven by energy efficiency mandates, smart city initiatives, and human-centric lighting trends. In 2026, the industry is projected to exceed ¥980 billion in revenue, with LED lighting comprising over 85% of production.

key_policy_initiatives.name: Action Plan for High-Quality Development of Lighting Industry (2024-2026)
key_measures: Promote smart lighting and IoT integration
Support R&D in human-centric lighting and Li-Fi
Encourage green manufacturing and circular economy

current_status_2025.automation_rate: 58% (SMT and assembly lines in large factories)

subsectors: outdoor lighting (street lights, floodlights, landscape lights)
specialty lighting (plant grow lights, UV-C, aquarium)

applications: retail (hardware stores, lighting specialty stores, supermarkets)
export to global markets (EU, US, Southeast Asia, Middle East)

specializations: LED lighting (Guzhen is 'Lighting Capital of China')

key_hubs.specialization: All types of lighting, especially decorative, LED, and components
key_hubs.supplier_example: Guzhen International Lighting Center – thousands of manufacturers and wholesalers

key_hubs.specialization: LED chips, smart lighting, high-end design
key_hubs.supplier_example: MLS Co., Ltd. – major LED lighting manufacturer, also produces LED packages

key_hubs.specialization: Residential lighting, ceiling fans with lights
key_hubs.supplier_example: FSL Lighting – one of China's oldest lighting brands

key_hubs.specialization: Outdoor lighting, LED street lights, industrial lighting
key_hubs.supplier_example: Ningbo Yaming Lighting – listed company, exports widely
Changzhou Xingyu Automotive Lighting Systems – automotive lighting leader
San'an Optoelectronics – leading LED chip manufacturer
Chongqing Scimee – environmental technology including lighting

LED_lamps_luminaires.description: LED bulbs, tubes, panels, downlights, spotlights, troffers, high bay lights. Dominates the market.
LED_lamps_luminaires.market_trends: Filament LED bulbs; tunable white; color tuning; ultra-slim panels.

outdoor_lighting.description: Street lights, floodlights, garden lights, landscape lights, smart poles with integrated lighting.
outdoor_lighting.market_trends: Solar-powered street lights; smart poles with 5G, sensors; Li-Fi integration.

smart_lighting.description: Connected bulbs, smart switches, lighting control systems, human-centric lighting.
smart_lighting.market_trends: Matter protocol adoption; voice control; circadian rhythm lighting.

automotive_lighting.description: Headlamps, fog lights, tail lights, interior lighting, adaptive driving beam systems.
automotive_lighting.market_trends: Matrix LED headlights; OLED tail lights; laser light.

specialty_lighting.description: Plant grow lights, UV-C disinfection, aquarium lighting, medical lighting.
specialty_lighting.market_trends: Full-spectrum grow lights; far-UV for disinfection.

supplier_evaluation_metrics.target: ISO 9001, ISO 14001; specific product certifications (CCC, CE, RoHS, UL, DLC, Energy Star)
Lumens, CRI, color temperature accuracy; photometric reports (IES, LDT); safety certifications
SMT lines, assembly capacity, in-house testing (integrating sphere, goniophotometer)
In-house design, optical simulation, ability to customize
Familiarity with target market certifications and requirements

verification_methods: Request certificates and test reports (LM-80, TM-21 for LED lifetime)
Conduct factory audit (SMT lines, QC processes, reliability testing)
Order samples for photometric testing and visual inspection
communication_best_practices: Provide detailed specifications: lumen output, color temperature, CRI, beam angle, dimensions
Discuss dimming and control options (0-10V, DALI, Bluetooth, Zigbee)
Request IES files for lighting design
Establish quality agreement (AQL levels, acceptable defects)
sourcing_guide.payment_terms: Typical: 30% deposit, 70% balance before shipment. For large orders, L/C at sight.

faq.question: What are typical MOQs for lighting products in China?
faq.answer: For standard LED bulbs, MOQ can be 500-2000 pieces. For luminaires, MOQ often 200-500 pieces. Custom products may have higher MOQs due to tooling. Some suppliers accept lower MOQs for sample orders.

faq.question: Do Chinese suppliers provide custom branding and packaging?
faq.answer: Yes, most offer OEM/ODM. They can apply your logo, use custom cartons, and include your manual. Custom packaging may have MOQ of 1000-3000 pieces.

faq.question: How can I ensure LED products have good quality and longevity?
faq.answer: Request LM-80 reports for LEDs and TM-21 lifetime projections. Ensure drivers are from reputable brands. Check warranty terms. Conduct sample testing for lumen maintenance and thermal performance.

faq.question: What certifications are required for importing lighting to Europe/US?
faq.answer: For EU: CE, RoHS, REACH, ERP (energy label). For US: UL, FCC, Energy Star (optional). Ensure supplier can provide these.

faq.question: Can I get smart lighting products with my own app/ecosystem?
faq.answer: Yes, many manufacturers offer custom smart lighting solutions with APIs or SDKs. Discuss integration requirements early.

glossary.CRI: Color Rendering Index – measure of light quality.
glossary.LM-80: Standard for measuring lumen depreciation of LEDs.
glossary.DLC: Design Lights Consortium – US efficiency standard.
glossary.IES: Illuminating Engineering Society – photometric file format.
glossary.DALI: Digital Addressable Lighting Interface – control protocol.
